issues_found: Source is a listing_page per source_type classification - violates Rule 5 which mandates rejection for listing pages
Source contains only links to visual statements with no substantive monetary policy content
event_type set to 'unknown' when the correct type (monetary_policy_report or rate_decision) would be determinable from actual linked pages
No policy decisions, interest rate changes, or forward guidance present
Published_at date missing, which compounds the low-value nature of this listing page
No archival value as a standalone source per rule 6 (thin low-signal sources bias toward reject)
human_review_reason: The record itself correctly identifies this as a non-archiveable listing page and the LLM review flags it appropriately. However, human confirmation is needed to formally reject and ensure the routing captures the correct reason: listing_page type per rule 5.

corrected_fields.summary: This is a navigation/index page on the ECB website that lists links to visual monetary policy statements from press conferences, spanning dates from March 19, 2026 back to July 2021. The page itself contains no specific monetary policy content, decisions, or analysis—it is an archive index without any embedded policy detail. This page should be rejected per archiving rules as it is a listing_page with no standalone archival value.
corrected_fields.why_it_matters: This source has no direct research value as it contains no substantive monetary policy content. It is an index page that would require visiting individual linked pages to access actual ECB policy statements. Per rule 5, listing pages are ineligible for archiving.
